site.title: Eurolux Digital | Websites That Win Business
site.description: Eurolux Digital helps businesses build, redesign, and upgrade websites that look professional, build trust, and generate leads.

imprint.title: Imprint | Eurolux Digital
imprint.description: Legal disclosure and company information for Eurolux Group.

privacy.title: Data Privacy | Eurolux Digital
privacy.description: Privacy policy and data protection information for Eurolux Group.

Hero.title: Unique websites which represent your brand accurately.
Hero.subtitle: We help companies launch modern, high-credibility websites that build trust, clarify their offer and generate more qualified inquiries.
Hero.footnoteHtml: Not sure what you need? Inquire for a new website, redesign, upgrade or ongoing improvements.

Problem.heading: Your website may be costing you trust before you even talk to a client.

items.title: Outdated First Impression
items.body: If your site looks old or inconsistent, prospects may assume your service quality is the same.

items.title: Unclear Value
items.body: Visitors leave when they cannot quickly understand what you do and why they should choose you for their specific needs.

items.title: Limited Platforms
items.body: Basic builder setups often restrict performance, flexibility and long-term growth.

items.title: Weak Conversion Flow
items.body: A website that only exists online is not enough — it should guide users toward inquiry.

Services.heading: Different website services designed for specific business needs.

items.title: New Website Development
items.body: Build a professional website from scratch with a clear structure, strong messaging and lead-focused pages.

items.title: Website Redesign
items.body: Transform an outdated site into a modern, credible experience that reflects the level of your business.

items.title: Website Upgrade / Migration
items.body: Move beyond limited platforms to a more professional setup with better flexibility and performance.

items.title: Ongoing Improvements / Updates
items.body: Keep your website current with continuous refinements, feature updates and conversion enhancements.

Why.heading: Optimal execution for all industries.
Why.body: You get a team based in Germany with a process built around your specific business goals, speed and clarity.
Why.imageAlt: Hamburg harbor skyline at dusk representing strong logistics and business infrastructure
benefits: Modern, premium visual direction aligned with business credibility
Custom strategy and structure, not one-size-fits-all templates
Fast, clear collaboration with direct communication
Conversion-focused decisions from layout to messaging to CTAs
Practical support for moving beyond outdated or limited setups
Built around your real-world goals: inquiries, trust and growth

Process.heading: A clear path from inquiry to launch.

steps.title: Inquiry
steps.body: Share your current website situation, goals and priorities.

steps.title: Concept / Review
steps.body: Define structure, direction and the right approach for your business.

steps.title: Build / Redesign
steps.body: Implement a polished, conversion-oriented website experience.

steps.title: Launch / Optimize
steps.body: Go live confidently and improve continuously where it matters.

items.q: Do you also redesign existing websites?
items.a: Yes. Redesign projects are a core service, especially for companies with outdated design, structure or messaging.

items.q: Do you offer ongoing updates after launch?
items.a: Yes. Ongoing support is available for iterative improvements, content updates and performance refinements.
Start with a website inquiry. Share your goals and current challenges, then we provide a recommended next step.

items.q: Do you provide a custom solution for my business?
items.a: Yes. Every project is tailored to your business context, target audience and conversion goals.

items.q: How much does a project usually cost?
items.a: Pricing depends on scope, timeline and technical requirements. Reach out with your project details for a tailored quote.

section.heading: Let’s modernize your website and turn it into a real growth asset.
section.body: Tell us about your current website, business goals and what you want to improve. You will get a clear, business-focused response.

form.title: Tell us about your website project

placeholders.name: Your name
placeholders.project_details: Briefly describe your website goals or current challenges.

Footer.heading: Eurolux Digital
Footer.tagline: Premium website build, redesign and upgrade for businesses that want a credible digital presence and more qualified inquiries.
